node.text:
Guys I finally put all the deets in a mini E-book that’s in my bio (price of a coffee) for those who want gorg natural skin at 80😭 this is what she did. literally, my whole account is based off confidence in our natural skin. My grandma who I admire did JUST THAT. 

In the mini PDF:
her 🔑 spf 
all the links
further deets on what she puts in the body: supliments, diet inspo 
the process listed 📝 

it’s small but mighty and all in one place 🤍

#skincare #naturalskin
Her man didn't stress her out
@danahnazareth that was immediately my first thought
Grandma needs to open her skincare Instagram account
@_.svsvrose._ they stayed at home and got no sun
Your skin is amazing, wow, what products do you use?
Used less makeup in her young ages
@jo.stl03 it’s called protecting her skin from sun damage
@jo.stl03 Science says its sunscreen or avoiding the sun. And she is wearing makeup 😂
Dude delete your comment if you dont so research before commenting
Girls the secret is to eat healthy drink water a lot, sleep very well, and don’t expose to sun too much apply sunscreen  you will not age fast 😘
How to get her secrets😍she is beautiful
No because what is she doing different???😭🤚🏼🙏🏼
@miep_123_ in the PDF BABBYYY🤍🤍🤍or there’s more vids, I’ll do some more x
Same. My grandma and mother also have slower aging 👏
For sure she is an oily skin girlie ✨💅🏻
I like the girl who said :"her man didnt stress her out"
